'''sazhuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squadra|squadra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squadra|squadra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sazhuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæzhizith|sæzhizith]] || [[word:sæzhizij|sæzhizij]] || [[word:sæzhizish|sæzhizish]] || [[word:sæzhizi|sæzhizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sazhuzhuzuth|sazhuzhuzuth]] || [[word:sazhuzhuzuj|sazhuzhuzuj]] || [[word:sazhuzhuzush|sazhuzhuzush]] || [[word:sazhuzhuzu|sazhuzhuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sazhuzuth|sazhuzuth]] || [[word:sazhuzuj|sazhuzuj]] || [[word:sazhuzush|sazhuzush]] || [[word:sazhuzu|sazhuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sazhufzuth|sazhufzuth]] || [[word:sazhufzuj|sazhufzuj]] || [[word:sazhufzush|sazhufzush]] || [[word:sazhufzuf|sazhufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sazhuzuthu|sazhuzuthu]] || [[word:sazhuzuju|sazhuzuju]] || [[word:sazhuzushu|sazhuzushu]] || [[word:sazhuzuku|sazhuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sazhuzuth|sazhuzuth]] || [[word:sazhuzuj|sazhuzuj]] || [[word:sazhuzush|sazhuzush]] || [[word:sazhuzu|sazhuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sazhuzuthul|sazhuzuthul]] || [[word:sazhuzujul|sazhuzujul]] || [[word:sazhuzushul|sazhuzushul]] || [[word:sazhuzukul|sazhuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sazhuzuthuthu|sazhuzuthuthu]] || [[word:sazhuzujuju|sazhuzujuju]] || [[word:sazhuzushushu|sazhuzushushu]] || [[word:sazhuzuku|sazhuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sazhuzuthun|sazhuzuthun]] || [[word:sazhuzujun|sazhuzujun]] || [[word:sazhuzushun|sazhuzushun]] || [[word:sazhuzukun|sazhuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sazhuzuthuoro|sazhuzuthuoro]] || [[word:sazhuzujuoro|sazhuzujuoro]] || [[word:sazhuzushuoro|sazhuzushuoro]] || [[word:sazhuzukuoro|sazhuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
